column2: All employees must complete security training annually.
column3: Employees are required to undergo yearly security training.

column2: Data backups should be stored offsite to prevent loss.
column3: Store backups at an offsite location to avoid data loss.

column2: Users must change their passwords every 90 days.
column3: Passwords must be updated by users at least once every quarter.

column2: Incidents must be reported to the IT helpdesk immediately.
column3: Report any security incidents to IT support without delay.

column2: Access to confidential data requires manager approval.
column3: Manager approval is required for confidential data access.

column2: Mobile devices must be encrypted before connecting to the network.
column3: Encrypt mobile devices prior to network connection.

column2: Software updates are applied monthly by the admin team.
column3: The admin team applies software updates on a monthly basis.

column2: Physical access badges should be worn at all times on premises.
column3: Wear physical access badges at all times while on company premises.

column2: All remote sessions must use VPN with MFA enabled.
column3: Enable MFA on VPN for all remote sessions.

column2: System logs must be retained for a minimum of one year.
column3: Retain system logs for at least one year.
